title: Sustainable Jobs Training Fund  - Canada.ca
content:
## Sustainable Jobs Training Fund
This funding opportunity aims to support a series of training projects that will help workers upgrade or gain new skills for jobs in the low-carbon economy. The fund will focus on low-carbon energy and carbon management, green buildings and retrofits, as well as electric vehicle maintenance and charging infrastructure.

## Information sessions
We’ll hold information sessions to give an overview of this application process. You can take part online or by teleconference.
- April 10, 2024, at 1:30 pm, EDT (French)
- April 11, 2024, at 1:30 pm, EDT (English)
If you'd like to attend, send an email to SJTF-FFED@servicecanada.gc.ca by April 05, 2024 at 5:00 pm, EDT.
In your email, specify your preferred language (English or French) and if you need accommodations. Instructions will be sent on how to attend.

## Help and contact information
- What are grants and contributions?
- We’ll respond to enquiries between March 8, 2024, to May 13, 2024, at 3:00 pm, EDT.
- Email: SJTF-FFED@servicecanada.gc.ca
- If you need help or accommodations, please contact us by May 8, 2024, at 3:00 pm, EDT.
- Email:  SJTF-FFED@servicecanada.gc.ca

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
